scripts.postbuild: pagefind --site dist && npx tsx scripts/run-internal-linker.ts && npx tsx scripts/generate-image-sitemap.ts && npx tsx scripts/generate-video-sitemap.ts && npx tsx scripts/generate-llms-txt.ts && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('dist/pagefind', 'public/pagefind', { recursive: true })" && npx tsx scripts/verify-links.ts
